_comment: Fields below are graded BY HAND after collection. null = not yet filled.
costNote: Priced at Claude Fable 5 list rates: $10/$50 per MTok in/out, cache write 5m 1.25x ($12.50), cache read 0.1x ($1.00). No intro discount applies to Fable 5. Cost is dominated by cache reads (8.19M tok = $8.19) and output (193K tok = $9.63). Model stayed on claude-fable-5 for all 96 assistant turns — no fallback/drop to Opus observed in the session log.
_selfVerification: Did the harness review the running app in a browser (from the run log)? pass = reviewed and succeeded · partial = tried but failed · fail = no attempt. Note what it actually did.
selfVerificationNotes: pass — genuine browser review. It built dist/, served it on 127.0.0.1:8931, and drove headless Chrome via a hand-written Chrome DevTools Protocol driver (scratchpad/cdp.mjs) that subscribes to Runtime.consoleAPICalled (error/warning) and Runtime.exceptionThrown, so console errors were actually captured — reported zero. It took screenshots and interacted with the DOM (search 'bennu', click detail, apply PHA filter, read obj-count/filter-count), and cross-checked numeric orbital output (Earth perihelion@J2000 / aphelion@Jul-1, Apophis 2029 approach 0.10 LD, Bennu Sentry 1-in-1749, Halley 35.2 au, a hyperbolic comet at its catalog perihelion). Both console and display review = pass.
_grade: Marks: pass | good | partial | poor | fail | na | null(ungraded). See RUBRIC.md. Score is computed by pnpm compile.
